<s> Bo zabrdast korum kandori shokriya Artam wa d Kam .Ispa Qabile fakher Kai tan Chitralo tan awam Asanio Bache Har wakhat koshesha Asuss .Allah pak ta Mazied kamyab korarr chitralo Taraqio Bache Ta kamyabe Bo zaruri sher Kai .A Kai ispa Upper chitalo khas Kori parkosapo chunjo chapalie kargino khoxo wa preapo awamot telfunik Masailo Bo samna sher .Kia Elaqan Naman ki pratam Hera E telenoaru Tawer sher hato service Bo kamzur hash joshe ki no biko so barabar .awa ta E Nachiz Soppoter Tat Ghozarish koman ki ispa Hami xaghante Ufhuno ya Jezz Moblingo Tawerr ki besir Ta Bo merbani besir la ma Qabile fakher Kai .Ma Omeed boyan ma commando ki loltawo laziman ma haya Darkhasto sora ghawor kos insha Allah .haya korum ispa Bache Bo Aham sher .ispa Elaqo Rui Telenoaru Naqes Service wajhin Bo Taklifa asuni .our haya korum ispa Elaqo Namyendaghan ta Agh koreliek het veze No konyan .lihaza Tat Ghozarish koman ispa haya Maslo Hal ki kos ispa Elaqo awam tat Doa Koni .ispa kia karubari korum pasawo no bonyan .Sirf ispa Elaqo jawnn axelie ka fawaja ka policea sikowot f.c .wa kos Axelie Berio Mulken korum konyan hatan tan Nantatan so Rabta ki no boyan kandori perishanio samna boyan . </s>

<s> Brar ginian munafiqat poshi astam magar haya inteha hoy hanun 10:45 a ispa DC sahib sum hato offica nishi astam awa jalal advocate aur Shoaib Mir hatera he jazz Wala de astay. zazdio towero bachen approval letter DC sahib tan aagy koriko hate tima tan sign Kori toten diko he mosh chiu biti baghay. hato gani aur he muqa istaro e brar d Hera asitay dc offico employee. hase aur ispa 12:30 Biko u nisi main roada giko ispa haya chairman saib htra deye af be astye or hte tima d afghan Riza saib kura ghechi no hai.Juo lu hami toweran bara ispa mastuja e brar e mas prushti lu diti astay ki mulkhowa jazzo main tower sawzesian hateghar zazdio hato ten d 4G pass Kori ho d operational kosian wa e mastuja tower kosian re astay.he braro taluq d mastujo sum sher hes jazzo employee .hanun kiawat ki he korum start honi ma Hami ju brar gini credit ganiko bachn bo qaq astani hato Gani nishi tani.awelo lu haya ki Network etc PTA undera gonian aur PTA federal governmento idara nast ho hush korik zaruri.aur shukria de ki aretam federal governmento korelik. </s>
